code:
fn validate(_ name: String, _ age: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut errs = [0, 0, 0]
  mut idx = 0
  if name == ""
    errs = [1, 0, 0]
    idx = idx + 1
  end
  if age < 0
    if idx == 0
      errs = [2, 0, 0]
    else
      errs = [1, 2, 0]
    end
    idx = idx + 1
  end
  if age > 150
    if idx == 0
      errs = [3, 0, 0]
    else if idx == 1
      errs = [errs[0], 3, 0]
    else
      errs = [errs[0], errs[1], 3]
    end
    idx = idx + 1
  end
  if idx == 0
    []
  else if idx == 1
    [errs[0]]
  else if idx == 2
    [errs[0], errs[1]]
  else
    [errs[0], errs[1], errs[2]]
  end
end

fn name_of(_ code: Int) -> String
  match code
  when 1
    "empty-name"
  when 2
    "negative-age"
  when 3
    "too-old"
  when _
    ""
  end
end

fn report(_ name: String, _ age: Int) -> Unit
  let errs = validate(name, age)
  let n = errs.len()
  if n == 0
    println("ok")
  else
    mut msg = "errors="
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      match errs.get(i)
      when Some(code)
        if i == 0
          msg = "#{msg}#{name_of(code)}"
        else
          msg = "#{msg},#{name_of(code)}"
        end
      when None
        msg = msg
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(msg)
  end
end

report("", -5)
report("Alice", 30)
report("Bob", 200)
